📝 Mayor's Blog Update (Published: June 25, 2026)

On Thursday, June 25, I was invited to and attended the FY2026 Regular General Meeting of the Public Interest Incorporated Association Hanno City Silver Human Resources Center, held at the Comprehensive Welfare Center.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202606/13877.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno Silver Human Resources Center FY2026 Regular General Meeting
